rationale_overall: As of 2024-06-30, all eight tickers hold intact theses. RKLB confirmed strong Q1 2024 momentum (69% YoY revenue growth, $1B+ backlog, $515M SDA contract, Archimedes engine-build completion May 7, 2024). URA's nuclear thesis was reinforced by the AWS-Talen 10-year 960 MW nuclear PPA (March 2024), the first hyperscaler baseload-nuclear deal of the cycle. IONQ beat Q1 2024 guidance ($7.6M, +77% YoY), raised full-year bookings to $75-95M, and launched a record AQ36 system in Europe. BOTZ is supported by a deepening humanoid-robotics venture wave (Figure AI $675M Series B, Feb 2024). MSFT/GOOGL/NVDA remain the AI ride with capex still accelerating. Two potential entrants were rejected for thin history: OKLO (NYSE-listed May 2024, ~7 weeks) and NUKZ (launched Jan 2024, ~5 months) — URA already covers nuclear and the optimizer's 1.5y lookback would be data-starved. No defense-ETF add was supported by sufficient pre-date evidence. Watchlist left unchanged.
